name: Graham Cracker Pie Shell
recipeInstructions:
1. Break graham wafers into small pieces and place in a plastic bag.
2. Fasten the opening of the bag with a bag tie.
3. Press the graham wafers using a rolling pin or a large jar until all crumbs are fine (total of 1 1/4 cups).
4. Empty the contents into a bowl.
5. Melt the margarine and add it to the crumbs. Mix well with a fork.
6. Set aside 2 tbsp for garnish on the pie filling.
7. Using the back of a spoon, press the remainder of the crumb mixture evenly onto the bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie plate.
8. Chill in the refrigerator for 3 hours or longer before filling.
Food Exchange per serving: (crust only) 1 FAT EXCHANGE + 1/2 STARCH EXCHANGE; CAL: 86; CHO: 9g; PRO: 1g; FAT: 5g; SOD: 108mg; CHO: 0mg;
LOW-SODIUM DIETS: Use unsalted margarine.
